description.value: Aura moderate enchantment; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 32,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This sturdy wooden staff is crowned by a holy symbol, surrounded by wicked barbs of metal. The staff allows use of the following spells: Castigate (1 charge) Command (1 charge) Zone of Truth (1 charge) Denounce (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells castigate, command, denounce, zone of truth; Cost 16,000 gp.
